positive: A highly detailed, intricate celestial floral arrangement featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, swirling nebulae, and geometric crystalline leaves. The style is neo-tattoo fine line illustration mixed with deep jewel-toned cosmic watercolor washes. Use strong black outlines against a gradient background that transitions from deep indigo to mystical emerald green. The composition is centrally focused, perfectly balanced, and designed to wrap around a garment. High contrast, clean silhouettes, symmetrical elements, esoteric, magical realism, ink wash, botanical etching, high resolution, crisp lines, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blurry, low quality, grainy, smudge, text, words, signature, watermark, logo, gradient fade, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, solid color blocks, out of frame
